overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic waterfront plaza at dusk. The scene transitions from a neon-lit interior bar to an open pedestrian area with palm trees, robotic NPCs, and large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic bar interior with neon lighting

events.description: approaching and passing through exit doorway from indoor bar to outdoor plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through a neon-lit bar toward the exit, passing tables and bar counters

entered.detail: red neon signs and lighting fixtures above the bar area
rotating ceiling fan visible in the upper part of the frame
large glass panels showing the outdoor plaza
dark wooden bar counter with stools
large open doorway leading to the outside plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a futuristic bar with red neon lighting and modern decor. The camera moves steadily forward toward a large exit doorway, passing by the bar counter on the right and glass windows on the left that reveal the outdoor plaza ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with reflective pavement and palm trees

events.description: exits building into open waterfront plaza with wet reflective pavement and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza, passing by water features and palm trees while approaching a group of robotic figures

entered.detail: futuristic multi-story building with curved roof and glass facade
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza
reflective tiled pavement showing reflections of the sky and surroundings
rectangular water pools embedded in the plaza ground
outdoor food vendor stall with large white umbrella

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vast open plaza with wet reflective pavement and scattered palm trees against a blue dusk sky. The camera walks past water features and a food stall while a distinctive modern building remains visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza area with digital billboards and robotic pedestrians

events.description: encounter group of robotic cybernetic NPCs standing in the plaza path

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing by robotic cybernetic characters and approaching a large digital billboard

notable_agents.action: group of robotic cybernetic characters with mechanical limbs standing in the plaza

entered.detail: group of tall robotic figures with visible mechanical components and glowing elements
massive vertical billboard displaying '3 Mouths 1 Desire' advertisement with red graphics
small yellow and green vendor booth on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through the central plaza area, the camera passes a group of distinctive robotic cybernetic NPCs standing near the path. A large digital billboard displaying an advertisement becomes prominent on the left as the camera continues toward a commercial area with vendor kiosks.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian walkway with building overhang and digital signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pedestrian walkway beside a commercial building with large digital screens, approaching an overpass structure

entered.detail: tall commercial building facade with multiple large digital advertising screens
illuminated digital billboards mounted on the building showing various advertisements
elevated walkway or bridge structure spanning across the plaza ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a covered pedestrian walkway alongside a commercial building featuring large digital advertising screens. The camera moves steadily forward toward an overpass structure in the distance, with palm trees now visible on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a futuristic bar into a sprawling, open-air waterfront plaza at dusk. It begins by moving steadily forward through a red-lit lounge, passing a bar counter and glass windows before stepping through a large exit doorway. As the camera emerges, the environment opens into a vast plaza with wet, reflective pavement and scattered palm trees under a deep blue sky, gliding past water features and a food stall. The scene then shifts toward the central pedestrian area, passing a group of cybernetic NPCs and a prominent digital billboard before approaching a cluster of vendor kiosks. Finally, the camera enters a covered walkway lined with large advertising screens, moving steadily toward a distant overpass structure with palm trees framing the left side of the view.
